title: Vanila & Visual
description: Vanilla+ build containing atmospheric mods, resource packs, and shaders
body:
Vanilla+ build containing atmospheric mods, resource packs, and shaders

## Description

The modpack changes the **atmosphere and effects** of various actions, such as breaking or creating something on an anvil. It adds **animations** to almost everything and makes the weather more pleasant

**Sound effects** also change, for example, echoes appear, walking sounds change, and ambient sounds are added 

### Features

Please note that the BetterClouds, Presence Footsteps, and Subtle Effects configurations have been modified in this build.


BetterClouds - disabled
Presence Footsteps - volume set to 35 instead of 100
Subtle Effects - dust effect when running disabled

**For the best atmosphere, enable all resource packs and shaders**

## Goals

The modpack itself adds visuals to the game, making it more enjoyable and immersive. In the future, I aim to make it even more immersive

At this stage, the modpack leaves Minecraft unchanged and doesn't change as much as I would like. I want to make something similar to “actions & stuff” but on the Java edition

![Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b69776555974f4711b1ee35720500aa92b2d5490_0.webp)
